content.en:
And from the words of the Su Domain Lord, it can be known that the so-called calamity is really nothing.

And his current strength is indeed nothing.

"I thought that my strength was comparable to that of the Nine Folds Dao Realm, and I was already a strong person in the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, but now it seems that I am still very weak!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Even the Immortal Emperor who was invincible in the Ninefold Dao Realm had to listen to those elders and patriarchs, what was his strength?

......

In the following years, Ye Tian was cultivating and comprehending the Fifth Sequence Dao Rules.

And for a long time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon did not continue to invade the Blood River Fortress.

But soon after, a piece of news came that the six small fortresses had been breached by the Supreme Dao Void Demon, which seemed to be the revenge of the Supreme Dao Void Demon's side, and when the support of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance arrived, they all fled, and even destroyed those Innate Origin Domains.

If the top level of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance could not predict this kind of thing in advance, he didn't believe it.

The more likely is - ignore!

That's right, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance directly ignored their invasion, because it didn't want to anger the upper echelons of the Dao Void Demon, and at the cost of these Innate Origin Domains, to calm their anger, as long as they could keep the Blood River Fortress and not expand the war.

As soon as he thought of this, Ye Tian shuddered.

If the Innate Origin Alliance gave up the Winter Night Fortress, then the Winter Night Fortress would definitely be finished.

"The Lord of the Su Domain is in the Winter Night Fortress, her status in the Sioux Clan is not low, how can the Innate Origin Domain Alliance give up the Winter Night Fortress!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The main thing is strength, if he is strong, he can ignore everything.

"The first goal is to first cultivate the Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules to the Ten Percent Perfection Realm, and then find a way to comprehend the Fourth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Time flickered, and the day of the end of the catastrophe was getting closer and closer.

Although the Supreme Dao Void Demon side also attacked the major fortresses one after another, it did not invest too many troops, and it seemed that it was training, and the Innate Origin Domain Alliance was also very cooperative and would not send the powerful Zhi Dao Realm.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian met the Taibai Sword Lord, at this time, the Taibai Sword Lord had already broken through to the Sevenfold Dao Realm, obviously using his combat exploits to exchange the items of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and then he stepped into the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm.

"Taibai Sword Master, congratulations!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

"Ye Tian, my strength is nothing, the gap is too big compared to you!" said the Taibai Sword Lord hurriedly.

The two chatted for a while, and then separated.

In the following days, there was nothing going on in the Blood River Fortress and the Winter Night Fortress, and he could cultivate with peace of mind.

Finally, when the tribulation was about to end, Ye Tian's Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules were finally raised to the ten-percent realm.

"The Fifth Sequence Supreme Dao rules are complete, and many Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms can't do it!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

But when he thought that the Immortal Emperor had comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Supreme Dao in the Nine Folds Supreme Dao Realm, his achievement was not worth mentioning.

"We have to keep trying!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

......

"The Infinite Domain Origin has awakened!"

Ye Tian sensed it, and the Infinite Domain Origin seemed to have improved a little bit.

That's a good thing for Infinity!

And this also means that the catastrophe has passed.

And for a long time, the Supreme Dao Void Demon will at least not invade the Innate Origin Domain on a large scale.

Of course, those third-level, fourth-level, and fifth-level battlefields will definitely be carried out, which is equivalent to military training on both sides.

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Lord came back alive, but not all the Supreme Dao Realms came back alive, and even Ye Tian couldn't completely protect these people.

Compared to the supreme Dao realm of other innate origin domains, the Infinite Domain to Dao Realm is undoubtedly very good.

However, those Supreme Dao Realms of the Infinite Heavenly Palace suffered heavy losses, when they went, they were fifteen or seventeen to the Dao Realm, and only five of the Sevenfold Sevenfold Dao Realms came back, and the other Sevenfold Dao Realms all fell, and the three or more Supreme Dao Realms also suffered extremely heavy losses.

After coming back, the Taisu Palace Lord announced a retreat, and this time she also gained some combat exploits, mainly because of Ye Tian's light, and also exchanged a lot of resources.

Although there is no hope of impacting the Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, there is no problem in comprehending the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao to the Ten Percent Consummation Realm.

Moreover, it won't be long before the Taisu Palace will give birth to many Sevenfold Dao Realms, and the entire Infinite Domain will give birth to many Sevenfold Dao Realms.

After all, many of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms have exchanged for the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items, and this kind of Supreme Dao Rule items are not of high value, and many of the Sixfold Supreme Dao Realms that follow Ye Tian can use their combat exploits to exchange for one.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Seeing that the Wuji Heavenly Palace had suffered such a heavy loss, the Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable was also glad that he didn't go.

But when he saw the seven supreme Dao realms of Taisu Palace being born one after another, his heart was also full of jealousy.

Of course, when he heard about Ye Tian's achievements, he was also trembling, and he didn't dare to have the slightest dissatisfaction.

"Ye Tian's strength growth is too terrifying, he even killed the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, and more than one! Hundreds of Eightfold Dao Realm were killed, this is too exaggerated!"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor is only a not very powerful Eightfold Supreme Dao Realm, and those Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demons that Ye Tian killed are estimated to be more powerful than the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

Unexpectedly, in a short period of time, even the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was an ant in Ye Tian's eyes.

"The era of Wuji Heavenly Palace's domination of the Wuji Domain has passed, even if the Wuji Heavenly Emperor gets rid of the seal, it will be useless!" said the Sixth Heavenly Venerable secretly.

Next, he was also ready to stay in the Wuji Heavenly Palace honestly and enjoy himself, and he didn't dare to think about other things.

After the catastrophe, another 3,000 Dao epochs passed.

The impact of the catastrophe gradually passed, and the major innate primordial domains were regaining their vitality, and a venerable powerhouse was born.

The same is true of the Infinite Domain, during which hundreds of Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms have been born one after another.

Among them, the human race also gave birth to a large number of supreme realms, and Ye Tian's son Ye Xingchen even became a fourfold supreme realm, which was all Ye Tian's crazy cultivation.

Moreover, Ye Tian also let Ye Xingchen comprehend various Supreme Dao Rule items.

Now, Ye Xingchen has also comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and his combat power can be called invincible in the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm, of course, he can be called invincible in the Infinite Domain, and it is nothing in the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also used his authority to withdraw the Infinite Domain's True Dao Domain Battlefield Array.

After all, his hometown on the other side of the eternal shore was still in the battlefield array, and he naturally wanted to complete this battlefield array.

Besides, it's just a third-level battlefield, and if it is removed, it will be removed.

With the withdrawal of the battlefield array, the Terrans came out of the land of eternity and gradually spread throughout the Infinite Domain.
